folders.hero: Primary landing visuals and above-the-fold compositions
folders.ui/icons: System UI icons only; brand logos stay in brand folders
folders.backgrounds: Full-page background images and abstract environment assets
folders.ui/surfaces: Reusable panels, cards, shells, and interface surfaces
folders.ui/overlays: Noise, grid, glow, vignette, and depth overlays
folders.ui/gradients: Approved gradient backgrounds and accent bands
folders.typography: Type lockups, text treatments, and wordmark-safe exports
folders.motion: Lottie, JSON, MP4, WEBM, or animation-ready assets
folders.ui/glass: Glassmorphism panels, frosted cards, light refraction layers
folders.illustrations: Non-logo diagrams, concepts, scenes, and visual explainers

protectedRules: Do not store private compliance screenshots in public wwwroot assets.
Do not use random generated filenames in production.
Do not place brand logos inside ui folders.
Do not overwrite existing approved logo files.
